document.title: INNERStudios Software License & Terms of Service
document.intro: By creating this license key and using INNERStudios products, you explicitly agree to the following terms and conditions in their entirety.
document.section_1_text1: INNERStudios, its affiliates, and its products serve strictly as means and technological channels for the operation and opening of servers. We provide the software framework and tooling, but we do NOT control, host, endorse, or verify the content transmitted, uploaded, or executed within the server itself.
document.section_1_text2: All server content, activities, and interactions are the sole and exclusive responsibility of the server creator (you). INNERStudios accepts no liability for illegal, infringing, or malicious content hosted on servers utilizing our software.
document.section_2_text1: You agree to operate your server in compliance with all applicable local, national, and international laws. In the event of a valid legal complaint, DMCA takedown notice, law enforcement subpoena, or verified abuse report, INNERStudios will fully cooperate with authorities and will hand over any and all relevant data, including the server creator's personal information, IP addresses, and license records.
document.section_3_text1: INNERStudios reserves the right to immediately revoke, suspend, or permanently terminate any license key without prior notice or refund if we determine, at our sole discretion, that the server violates these terms, facilitates illegal activities, or harms the reputation of our platform.

tos.checkbox_label: I have carefully read, understood, and accept the Terms of Service. I acknowledge my full responsibility for the server's content and understand that my data will be provided to authorities in case of illegal activities or valid reports.
tos.error_toast_desc: You must accept the Terms of Service to continue.
